name: zed
notes: Requires GIT_CRATES and WEBRTC_COMMIT checks on every bump. See update_zed_editor.md.

name: carla
notes: Standard GitHub release. auto_upgrade can be enabled once upgrade workflow is proven.

name: surgext
notes: Non-standard tag pattern. Stable releases are tags only (no GitHub Release objects). Requires source repackaging with submodules via repackage-surge.yml before ebuild can fetch sources.

name: yabridge
notes: Current ebuild (5.1.2) tracks a development branch by commit SHA rather than a release tag due to Wine 10 embedding fixes. Version checking against release tags will lag behind actual ebuild state until a stable release incorporates the fixes.

name: amp-locker
notes: Downloads from Audio Assault S3 bucket. No public release API available. Updates must be checked manually at https://audioassault.mx/amplocker.php

name: drum-locker
notes: Downloads from Audio Assault S3 bucket. No public release API available. Updates must be checked manually at https://audioassault.mx/drumlocker.php

name: bitwig-studio
notes: Downloads directly from bitwig.com. No public release API. Updates must be checked manually at https://www.bitwig.com/download/. Use --version to trigger upgrade-ebuild.sh manually. Version strings can be 2-component (6.0) or 3-component (5.3.13). Verify download URL returns HTTP 302 before upgrading.

name: forticlient
notes: Downloads from Fortinet's apt repo. No public release API. Updates must be checked manually at https://www.fortinet.com/support/product-downloads
